overall.description: First-person exploration of a neon-lit cyberpunk food court and bar area at night. The player character walks through a futuristic indoor market with various food stalls, digital billboards, and scattered NPCs, eventually approaching a bar counter. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food court with vendor stalls and neon lighting

events.description: passes by a person in a red jacket working at a desk on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the food court, observing the various stalls and neon signs

illuminated digital displays showing food items and prices
tall bar stools with glowing purple lights underneath
large digital billboard displaying a woman in a purple frame
large outdoor umbrella providing shade over seating area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk food court illuminated by purple neon lights. The camera moves forward past a wooden food stall on the left where a person in a red jacket works at a desk. Digital menu screens and bar stools with purple underglow become visible ahead, while a large vertical billboard hangs in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central dining area with bar stools and graffiti-covered back wall

events.description: moving from the food stall area into the open central space with bar seating
turning left toward the back corner with the graffiti wall and recycling bins

agents.ego_description: walking through the central area and beginning to turn toward the back corner with the graffiti wall

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt walking away from camera toward the back wall

entered.detail: large concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
large yellow industrial recycling containers with black stripes
potted plants suspended from the ceiling structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the central dining area, passing the purple bar stools and approaching a graffiti-covered back wall. Yellow recycling bins appear on the right as the camera begins to turn left. A person in a yellow shirt walks away in the distance toward the graffiti wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner area with neon signage and worn furniture

events.description: approaching the bright purple neon Blue Moon sign illuminating the left side
entering the corner nook area with the worn couch and large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking toward the corner past the neon sign and approaching the couch area

entered.detail: circular purple neon sign with 'Blue Moon' text and decorative circles
silver metal crowd control barriers with yellow bases
large horizontal digital billboard displaying '16 FLAVORS YOU'D LOVE TO MIX'
tattered brown leather couch with a person sitting on it

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward a corner dominated by a bright purple neon Blue Moon sign. Metal barriers guide the path as the camera approaches a worn leather couch against the wall. A large digital billboard advertising '16 FLAVORS' becomes prominent on the wall above the couch area.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating nook with couch and corrugated metal bar counter

events.description: slowing down and circling around the couch to observe the seated NPC
moving from the couch area toward the final bar counter with the bartender

agents.ego_description: circling the couch to look at the seated man, then moving toward the bar counter with the bartender

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and black beanie sitting on the worn couch, looking down at something
customer in teal tank top leaning against the bar counter talking to the bartender

entered.detail: corrugated metal bar counter with bottles and neon lighting underneath
black metal food service cart with wheels and equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the worn couch where a man in a white shirt sits, then moves toward a corrugated metal bar counter. A customer in a teal tank top converses with the bartender at the bar. The large '16 FLAVORS' billboard remains visible in the background as the camera approaches the final bar area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk food court that transitions from a wide dining area into an intimate bar corner. It begins by gliding past a wooden food stall and a worker in a red jacket, moving toward digital menu screens and bar stools bathed in a purple underglow. As the camera pushes through the central dining area, it passes yellow recycling bins and a distant figure in a yellow shirt before turning left toward a graffiti-covered wall. The scene then shifts toward a bright purple Blue Moon sign and metal barriers, passing a worn leather couch beneath a prominent 16 FLAVORS digital billboard. Finally, the camera circles a man in a white shirt on the couch and approaches a corrugated metal bar counter where a customer in a teal tank top converses with the bartender.
